inputs.feature_spec: develop an app to try my sleep patterns by tying into apple health statics on my watch and iphone. It should provide insights and ana;lyssi from various dimensions

migrations.name: create_users_table
create_sleep_records_table
create_sleep_sessions_table
migrations.content:
CREATE TABLE sleep_sessions (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    user_id UUID REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE NOT NULL,
    start_time TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL,
    end_time TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL,
    duration_seconds INTEGER,
    sleep_efficiency REAL, -- Calculated sleep efficiency
    total_sleep_time_seconds INTEGER, -- Total time in sleep stages
    deep_sleep_seconds INTEGER,
    light_sleep_seconds INTEGER,
    rem_sleep_seconds INTEGER,
    wake_time_seconds INTEGER,
    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
    updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE INDEX idx_sleep_sessions_user_id ON sleep_sessions (user_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_sleep_sessions_start_time ON sleep_sessions (start_time);
CREATE INDEX idx_sleep_sessions_end_time ON sleep_sessions (end_time);

migrations.name: create_user_settings_table
migrations.content:
CREATE TABLE user_settings (
    user_id UUID PRIMARY KEY REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    preferred_units VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'metric',
    notifications_enabled BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
    updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
);

output.api_code:
from fastapi import FastAPI, Depends, HTTPException, status
from fastapi.security import OAuth2PasswordBearer, OAuth2PasswordRequestForm
from jose import JWTError, jwt
from datetime import datetime, timedelta
from typing import Annotated
from sqlalchemy import create_engine, Column, Integer, String, DateTime, Float
from sqlalchemy.ext.declarative import declarative_base
from sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker, Session
from passlib.context import CryptContext
from pydantic import BaseModel, EmailStr, constr


# Database Configuration
DATABASE_URL = "postgresql://user:password@db:5432/sleep_tracker"
engine = create_engine(DATABASE_URL)
SessionLocal = sessionmaker(autocommit=False, autoflush=False, bind=engine)
Base = declarative_base()

# Security
SECRET_KEY = "YOUR_SECRET_KEY"  # Change this in production
ALGORITHM = "HS256"
ACCESS_TOKEN_EXPIRE_MINUTES = 30

crypt_context = CryptContext(schemes=["bcrypt"], deprecated="auto")
oauth2_scheme = OAuth2PasswordBearer(tokenUrl="token")


# Models
class User(Base):
    __tablename__ = "users"

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, index=True)
    email = Column(String, unique=True, index=True)
    hashed_password = Column(String)


class SleepData(Base):
    __tablename__ = "sleep_data"

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, index=True)
    user_id = Column(Integer)
    start_time = Column(DateTime)
    end_time = Column(DateTime)
    sleep_duration = Column(Float)  # In hours
    sleep_stage_data = Column(String)  # JSON representation of sleep stages


Base.metadata.create_all(bind=engine)


# Pydantic Models
class UserCreate(BaseModel):
    email: EmailStr
    password: constr(min_length=8)


class Token(BaseModel):
    access_token: str
    token_type: str


class UserProfile(BaseModel):
    id: int
    email: EmailStr


class SleepDataCreate(BaseModel):
    start_time: datetime
    end_time: datetime
    sleep_stage_data: str


class SleepDataResponse(BaseModel):
    id: int
    start_time: datetime
    end_time: datetime
    sleep_duration: float
    sleep_stage_data: str


# Dependency
def get_db():
    db = SessionLocal()
    try:
        yield db
    finally:
        db.close()


def verify_password(plain_password, hashed_password):
    return crypt_context.verify(plain_password, hashed_password)


def get_password_hash(password):
    return crypt_context.hash(password)


def create_access_token(data: dict, expires_delta: timedelta | None = None):
    to_encode = data.copy()
    if expires_delta:
        expire = datetime.utcnow() + expires_delta
    else:
        expire = datetime.utcnow() + timedelta(minutes=ACCESS_TOKEN_EXPIRE_MINUTES)
    to_encode.update({"exp": expire})
    encoded_jwt = jwt.encode(to_encode, SECRET_KEY, algorithm=ALGORITHM)
    return encoded_jwt


async def get_current_user(token: str = Depends(oauth2_scheme), db: Session = Depends(get_db)):
    credentials_exception = HTTPException(
        status_code=status.HTTP_401_UNAUTHORIZED,
        detail="Could not validate credentials",
        headers={"WWW-Authenticate": "Bearer"},
    )
    try:
        payload = jwt.decode(token, SECRET_KEY, algorithms=[ALGORITHM])
        email: str = payload.get("sub")
        if email is None:
            raise credentials_exception

    except JWTError:
        raise credentials_exception
    user = db.query(User).filter(User.email == email).first()
    if user is None:
        raise credentials_exception
    return user


async def get_current_active_user(current_user: Annotated[User, Depends(get_current_user)]):
    return current_user


# FastAPI App
app = FastAPI()


@app.post("/api/v1/auth/register", response_model=UserProfile)
async def register_user(user: UserCreate, db: Session = Depends(get_db)):
    db_user = db.query(User).filter(User.email == user.email).first()
    if db_user:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail="Email already registered")
    hashed_password = get_password_hash(user.password)
    db_user = User(email=user.email, hashed_password=hashed_password)
    db.add(db_user)
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(db_user)
    return UserProfile(id=db_user.id, email=db_user.email)


@app.post("/api/v1/auth/login", response_model=Token)
async def login_for_access_token(form_data: OAuth2PasswordRequestForm = Depends(), db: Session = Depends(get_db)):
    user = db.query(User).filter(User.email == form_data.username).first()
    if not user:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_401_UNAUTHORIZED, detail="Incorrect username or password", headers={"WWW-Authenticate": "Bearer"})
    if not verify_password(form_data.password, user.hashed_password):
        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_401_UNAUTHORIZED, detail="Incorrect username or password", headers={"WWW-Authenticate": "Bearer"})
    access_token_expires = timedelta(minutes=ACCESS_TOKEN_EXPIRE_MINUTES)
    access_token = create_access_token(data={"sub": user.email}, expires_delta=access_token_expires)
    return {"access_token": access_token, "token_type": "bearer"}


@app.get("/api/v1/users/me", response_model=UserProfile)
async def read_users_me(current_user: Annotated[User, Depends(get_current_active_user)]):
    return UserProfile(id=current_user.id, email=current_user.email)


@app.post("/api/v1/sleep_data/", response_model=SleepDataResponse, status_code=status.HTTP_201_CREATED)
async def create_sleep_data(sleep_data: SleepDataCreate, current_user: Annotated[User, Depends(get_current_active_user)], db: Session = Depends(get_db)):
    db_sleep_data = SleepData(user_id=current_user.id, start_time=sleep_data.start_time, end_time=sleep_data.end_time, sleep_duration=(sleep_data.end_time - sleep_data.start_time).total_seconds() / 3600, sleep_stage_data=sleep_data.sleep_stage_data)
    db.add(db_sleep_data)
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(db_sleep_data)
    return SleepDataResponse(id=db_sleep_data.id, start_time=db_sleep_data.start_time, end_time=db_sleep_data.end_time, sleep_duration=db_sleep_data.sleep_duration, sleep_stage_data=db_sleep_data.sleep_stage_data)


@app.get("/api/v1/sleep_data/", response_model=list[SleepDataResponse])
async def read_sleep_data(current_user: Annotated[User, Depends(get_current_active_user)], db: Session = Depends(get_db)):
    sleep_data = db.query(SleepData).filter(SleepData.user_id == current_user.id).all()
    return sleep_data
output.api_tests:
import pytest
from fastapi.testclient import TestClient
from sqlalchemy import create_engine
from sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker
from main import app, Base, get_db, SECRET_KEY, ALGORITHM
from main import User
from fastapi import status
from jose import jwt
from datetime import datetime, timedelta

SQLALCHEMY_DATABASE_URL = "sqlite:///./test.db"

engine = create_engine(
    SQLALCHEMY_DATABASE_URL, connect_args={"check_same_thread": False}
)
TestingSessionLocal = sessionmaker(autocommit=False, autoflush=False, bind=engine)


Base.metadata.create_all(bind=engine)


def override_get_db():
    db = TestingSessionLocal()
    try:
        yield db
    finally:
        db.close()


app.dependency_overrides[get_db] = override_get_db

client = TestClient(app)


@pytest.fixture
def test_user():
    db = TestingSessionLocal()
    user = User(email="test@example.com", hashed_password="password") # In real test, hash the password
    db.add(user)
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(user)
    yield user
    db.delete(user)
    db.commit()
    db.close()


@pytest.fixture
def test_token(test_user):
    access_token_expires = timedelta(minutes=30)
    to_encode = {"sub": test_user.email}
    expire = datetime.utcnow() + access_token_expires
    to_encode.update({"exp": expire})
    encoded_jwt = jwt.encode(to_encode, SECRET_KEY, algorithm=ALGORITHM)
    return encoded_jwt


def test_register_user():
    response = client.post("/api/v1/auth/register", json={"email": "test2@example.com", "password": "password"})
    assert response.status_code == status.HTTP_200_OK
    assert response.json()["email"] == "test2@example.com"


def test_login_user(test_user): # Use fixture to create the user
    response = client.post("/api/v1/auth/login", data={"username": "test@example.com", "password": "password"})
    assert response.status_code == status.HTTP_200_OK
    assert "access_token" in response.json()


def test_read_users_me(test_token): # use fixture for the token
    response = client.get("/api/v1/users/me", headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {test_token}"})
    assert response.status_code == status.HTTP_200_OK
    assert response.json()["email"] == "test@example.com"


def test_create_sleep_data(test_token):
    response = client.post(
        "/api/v1/sleep_data/",
        headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {test_token}"},
        json={"start_time": "2024-01-01T22:00:00", "end_time": "2024-01-02T06:00:00", "sleep_stage_data": "{}"},
    )
    assert response.status_code == status.HTTP_201_CREATED
    assert response.json()["sleep_duration"] == 8.0


def test_read_sleep_data(test_token, test_user):
    # First create some sleep data
    client.post(
        "/api/v1/sleep_data/",
        headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {test_token}"},
        json={"start_time": "2024-01-01T22:00:00", "end_time": "2024-01-02T06:00:00", "sleep_stage_data": "{}"},
    )
    response = client.get("/api/v1/sleep_data/", headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {test_token}"})
    assert response.status_code == status.HTTP_200_OK
    assert len(response.json()) > 0
    assert response.json()[0]["sleep_duration"] == 8.0

components.name: LoginScreen
RegistrationScreen
SleepDataScreen
components.description: Component to display sleep data and insights.

components.name: App

test_cases.name: LoginScreen Test
steps: Render the LoginScreen component.
Enter valid email and password.
Press the Login button.
Verify that the onLogin function is called with the correct token upon successful login.
Verify that an error message is displayed if login fails.

test_cases.name: RegistrationScreen Test
steps: Render the RegistrationScreen component.
Enter valid email and password.
Press the Register button.
Verify that the registration API is called with the correct data.
Verify that a success message is displayed upon successful registration.
Verify that an error message is displayed if registration fails.

test_cases.name: SleepDataScreen Test
steps: Render the SleepDataScreen component with a valid token.
Verify that the sleep data is fetched and displayed correctly.
Verify that a loading indicator is displayed while the data is being fetched.
Verify that an error message is displayed if the data fetching fails.

test_cases.name: App Component Test
test_cases.description: Tests the main App component's authentication flow.
steps: Render the App component.
Verify that the LoginScreen and RegistrationScreen are initially displayed.
Log in successfully using the LoginScreen.
Verify that the SleepDataScreen is displayed after successful login.
Simulate a logout action.
Verify that the LoginScreen and RegistrationScreen are displayed again after logout.

ui_tests.testing_framework: Jest and React Native Testing Library

integration_tests.name: Full User Flow Integration Test
integration_tests.description: Tests the complete user flow from registration to viewing sleep data.
steps: Start the application.
Register a new user via the RegistrationScreen (frontend) by sending a POST request to /api/v1/auth/register (backend).
Verify that the user is successfully registered and a UserProfile is returned (backend database is updated).
Log in the newly registered user via the LoginScreen (frontend) by sending a POST request to /api/v1/auth/login (backend).
Verify that the login is successful and a JWT token is returned (backend).
Store the JWT token in AsyncStorage (frontend).
Navigate to the SleepDataScreen (frontend).
Create sleep data via the frontend which sends a POST request to /api/v1/sleep_data/ (backend) using the stored JWT token in the Authorization header.
Verify that the sleep data is successfully created and stored in the database (backend database is updated).
Retrieve the sleep data via the SleepDataScreen (frontend) by sending a GET request to /api/v1/sleep_data/ (backend) using the stored JWT token.
Verify that the sleep data is displayed correctly on the SleepDataScreen (frontend).
preconditions: The backend FastAPI server is running and accessible.
The PostgreSQL database is running and accessible.
The React Native application is running and connected to the backend.
AsyncStorage is configured correctly in the React Native environment.
expected_results: User is successfully registered in the database.
User is successfully authenticated and receives a JWT token.
JWT token is stored in AsyncStorage.
Sleep data is successfully created and stored in the database.
Sleep data is retrieved and displayed correctly in the SleepDataScreen.

integration_tests.name: Invalid Login Attempt Integration Test
integration_tests.description: Tests the scenario when a user attempts to log in with invalid credentials.
steps: Start the application.
Attempt to log in with invalid email and password via the LoginScreen (frontend) by sending a POST request to /api/v1/auth/login (backend).
Verify that the backend returns an HTTP 401 Unauthorized error.
Verify that an appropriate error message is displayed on the LoginScreen (frontend).
preconditions: The backend FastAPI server is running and accessible.
The PostgreSQL database is running and accessible.
The React Native application is running and connected to the backend.
expected_results: The backend returns an HTTP 401 Unauthorized error.
An error message is displayed on the LoginScreen indicating invalid credentials.

integration_tests.name: Unauthorized Access to Sleep Data Integration Test
integration_tests.description: Tests the scenario when a user attempts to access sleep data without a valid JWT token.
steps: Start the application.
Attempt to access the SleepDataScreen (frontend) without logging in or with an expired/invalid JWT token.
Verify that the frontend attempts to send a GET request to /api/v1/sleep_data/ (backend) without a valid Authorization header or with an invalid one.
Verify that the backend returns an HTTP 401 Unauthorized error.
Verify that an appropriate error message is displayed on the SleepDataScreen (frontend) or the user is redirected to the login screen.
preconditions: The backend FastAPI server is running and accessible.
The PostgreSQL database is running and accessible.
The React Native application is running and connected to the backend.
expected_results: The backend returns an HTTP 401 Unauthorized error.
An error message is displayed on the SleepDataScreen or the user is redirected to the login screen.

from fastapi import FastAPI, Depends, HTTPException, status
from fastapi.security import OAuth2PasswordBearer, OAuth2PasswordRequestForm
from jose import JWTError, jwt
from datetime import datetime, timedelta
from typing import Annotated
from sqlalchemy import create_engine, Column, Integer, String, DateTime, Float
from sqlalchemy.ext.declarative import declarative_base
from sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker, Session
from passlib.context import CryptContext
from pydantic import BaseModel, EmailStr, constr


# Database Configuration
DATABASE_URL = "postgresql://user:password@db:5432/sleep_tracker"
engine = create_engine(DATABASE_URL)
SessionLocal = sessionmaker(autocommit=False, autoflush=False, bind=engine)
Base = declarative_base()

# Security
SECRET_KEY = "YOUR_SECRET_KEY"  # Change this in production
ALGORITHM = "HS256"
ACCESS_TOKEN_EXPIRE_MINUTES = 30

crypt_context = CryptContext(schemes=["bcrypt"], deprecated="auto")
oauth2_scheme = OAuth2PasswordBearer(tokenUrl="token")


# Models
class User(Base):
    __tablename__ = "users"

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, index=True)
    email = Column(String, unique=True, index=True)
    hashed_password = Column(String)


class SleepData(Base):
    __tablename__ = "sleep_data"

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, index=True)
    user_id = Column(Integer)
    start_time = Column(DateTime)
    end_time = Column(DateTime)
    sleep_duration = Column(Float)  # In hours
    sleep_stage_data = Column(String)  # JSON representation of sleep stages


Base.metadata.create_all(bind=engine)


# Pydantic Models
class UserCreate(BaseModel):
    email: EmailStr
    password: constr(min_length=8)


class Token(BaseModel):
    access_token: str
    token_type: str


class UserProfile(BaseModel):
    id: int
    email: EmailStr


class SleepDataCreate(BaseModel):
    start_time: datetime
    end_time: datetime
    sleep_stage_data: str


class SleepDataResponse(BaseModel):
    id: int
    start_time: datetime
    end_time: datetime
    sleep_duration: float
    sleep_stage_data: str


# Dependency
def get_db():
    db = SessionLocal()
    try:
        yield db
    finally:
        db.close()


def verify_password(plain_password, hashed_password):
    return crypt_context.verify(plain_password, hashed_password)


def get_password_hash(password):
    return crypt_context.hash(password)


def create_access_token(data: dict, expires_delta: timedelta | None = None):
    to_encode = data.copy()
    if expires_delta:
        expire = datetime.utcnow() + expires_delta
    else:
        expire = datetime.utcnow() + timedelta(minutes=ACCESS_TOKEN_EXPIRE_MINUTES)
    to_encode.update({"exp": expire})
    encoded_jwt = jwt.encode(to_encode, SECRET_KEY, algorithm=ALGORITHM)
    return encoded_jwt


async def get_current_user(token: str = Depends(oauth2_scheme), db: Session = Depends(get_db)):
    credentials_exception = HTTPException(
        status_code=status.HTTP_401_UNAUTHORIZED,
        detail="Could not validate credentials",
        headers={"WWW-Authenticate": "Bearer"},
    )
    try:
        payload = jwt.decode(token, SECRET_KEY, algorithms=[ALGORITHM])
        email: str = payload.get("sub")
        if email is None:
            raise credentials_exception

    except JWTError:
        raise credentials_exception
    user = db.query(User).filter(User.email == email).first()
    if user is None:
        raise credentials_exception
    return user


async def get_current_active_user(current_user: Annotated[User, Depends(get_current_user)]):
    return current_user


# FastAPI App
app = FastAPI()


@app.post("/api/v1/auth/register", response_model=UserProfile)
async def register_user(user: UserCreate, db: Session = Depends(get_db)):
    db_user = db.query(User).filter(User.email == user.email).first()
    if db_user:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail="Email already registered")
    hashed_password = get_password_hash(user.password)
    db_user = User(email=user.email, hashed_password=hashed_password)
    db.add(db_user)
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(db_user)
    return UserProfile(id=db_user.id, email=db_user.email)


@app.post("/api/v1/auth/login", response_model=Token)
async def login_for_access_token(form_data: OAuth2PasswordRequestForm = Depends(), db: Session = Depends(get_db)):
    user = db.query(User).filter(User.email == form_data.username).first()
    if not user:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_401_UNAUTHORIZED, detail="Incorrect username or password", headers={"WWW-Authenticate": "Bearer"})
    if not verify_password(form_data.password, user.hashed_password):
        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_401_UNAUTHORIZED, detail="Incorrect username or password", headers={"WWW-Authenticate": "Bearer"})
    access_token_expires = timedelta(minutes=ACCESS_TOKEN_EXPIRE_MINUTES)
    access_token = create_access_token(data={"sub": user.email}, expires_delta=access_token_expires)
    return {"access_token": access_token, "token_type": "bearer"}


@app.get("/api/v1/users/me", response_model=UserProfile)
async def read_users_me(current_user: Annotated[User, Depends(get_current_active_user)]):
    return UserProfile(id=current_user.id, email=current_user.email)


@app.post("/api/v1/sleep_data/", response_model=SleepDataResponse, status_code=status.HTTP_201_CREATED)
async def create_sleep_data(sleep_data: SleepDataCreate, current_user: Annotated[User, Depends(get_current_active_user)], db: Session = Depends(get_db)):
    db_sleep_data = SleepData(user_id=current_user.id, start_time=sleep_data.start_time, end_time=sleep_data.end_time, sleep_duration=(sleep_data.end_time - sleep_data.start_time).total_seconds() / 3600, sleep_stage_data=sleep_data.sleep_stage_data)
    db.add(db_sleep_data)
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(db_sleep_data)
    return SleepDataResponse(id=db_sleep_data.id, start_time=db_sleep_data.start_time, end_time=db_sleep_data.end_time, sleep_duration=db_sleep_data.sleep_duration, sleep_stage_data=db_sleep_data.sleep_stage_data)


@app.get("/api/v1/sleep_data/", response_model=list[SleepDataResponse])
async def read_sleep_data(current_user: Annotated[User, Depends(get_current_active_user)], db: Session = Depends(get_db)):
    sleep_data = db.query(SleepData).filter(SleepData.user_id == current_user.id).all()
    return sleep_data

    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),

    light_sleep_seconds INTEGER,
    rem_sleep_seconds INTEGER,
    wake_time_seconds INTEGER,
    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
    updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE INDEX idx_sleep_sessions_user_id ON sleep_sessions (user_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_sleep_sessions_start_time ON sleep_sessions (start_time);
CREATE INDEX idx_sleep_sessions_end_time ON sleep_sessions (end_time);

CREATE TABLE user_settings (
    user_id UUID PRIMARY KEY REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    preferred_units VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'metric',
    notifications_enabled BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
